raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The state has already confirmed $11 billion in fraud related to unemployment insurance claims.",
    "More than $31 billion in unemployment benefits has the potential to be fraudulently claimed, impacting taxpayers.",
    "Audits have uncovered billions of dollars in misspent unemployment insurance benefits at the Employment Development Department due to its inability to prevent fraud.",
    "Over 35,000 Pandemic Unemployment Assistance claims were filed on behalf of inmates between March and August 2020, with more than half of those claims paid despite ineligibility.",
    "California was one of only 15 states that failed to cross-match unemployment benefit claims with jail and prison rolls.",
    "A widely utilized fraud scheme was able to steal nearly $1 billion in taxpayer money due to inadequate state procedures.",
    "Kern County has processed over $16 million in fraudulent prison claims related to unemployment benefits."
  ]
```
